response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics of the speech and song match the provided Reference JSON lyrics and details.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for reference and filled in the initial announcement manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles to follow the precise vocal audio cues of Nene's speaking voice and singing, keeping start times perfectly synchronized.

subtitles.original: リバーシブル仕様の直筆サイン入りアナザージャケット！
subtitles.english: A reversible, hand-signed alternative cover!

subtitles.original: どっちをね、表にして主役にしてもいいですし、
subtitles.english: You can make either side the main cover,

subtitles.original: なんなら2個買っていただいて両方とも表面にして、ねねとねねをがちゃんこさせてください。
subtitles.english: and if you want, buy two and display both covers to make Nene and Nene combine!

subtitles.original: そして、えー、こちらがついてきます。
subtitles.english: And, uh, this also comes with it.

subtitles.original: レコーディングブックと、ホロライブオフィシャルカードゲームのカードがついてきまーす！
subtitles.english: It comes with a recording book and a Hololive Official Card Game card!

subtitles.original: ねねのね、どんな感じで歌ってたとか、ここ怒られたとか、そういうのがまとまったノートになってます。
subtitles.english: It's a notebook that sums up how I sang, where I got scolded, and things like that.

subtitles.original: そして、もう一つあります。なんと、こちら！
subtitles.english: And, there is one more thing. Look at this!

subtitles.original: ねねねのね、ねねの1st EP、グッズとして出したね、ねねのCDが復刻になります！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: My 1st EP, "NeNeNeNeNe!", which was originally released as merchandise, will be re-released! Yay!

subtitles.original: これね、あの、意外と、たぶん、持ってる人少ない、少ないんじゃないかなと思います。
subtitles.english: I think surprisingly few people might have this one.

subtitles.original: あの、今までのねねのね、あの、有名な曲たちが入っていますので、こちらの復刻版もぜひ聴いて、今回のアルバムと一緒に全曲聴いて覚えてほしいなって思います。
subtitles.english: It contains Nene's famous songs from back then, so please listen to this re-release and learn all the songs along with the new album.

subtitles.original: さて、さっきリミナルのMVの告知をしたと思うんですけど、どんな曲か聴きたいよね、みんな。
subtitles.english: Now, I think I just announced the MV for "Liminal" earlier, but everyone wants to hear what kind of song it is, right?

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、ねね、今からしっとりとやっていこうかなと思います。
subtitles.english: So, Nene is going to perform it with a calm, gentle vibe now.

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください。「Liminal」。
subtitles.english: Please listen. "Liminal".

subtitles.original: 見つめる 霞んだ瞳で
subtitles.english: Staring with hazy eyes...

subtitles.original: 光を探して迷ってた
subtitles.english: ...lost while searching for the light.

subtitles.original: いくつの痛みに 縛られたまま
subtitles.english: Still bound by countless pains,

subtitles.original: 頬を伝う
subtitles.english: streaming down my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 画面に映る私はどうして
subtitles.english: Why is it that the me reflected on the screen...

subtitles.original: 涙の跡が消されているんだろう
subtitles.english: ...has the traces of her tears erased?

subtitles.original: ひび割れたガラスの向こう
subtitles.english: On the other side of the cracked glass,

subtitles.original: 笑って繕っていた
subtitles.english: I smiled and patched things up.

subtitles.original: 誰かがいた
subtitles.english: Someone was there.

subtitles.original: 偽物みたいだ 「ただの影だ」って
subtitles.english: They assumed I was like a fake, "just a shadow,"...

subtitles.original: 決め付けたけど
まやかしじゃなくて
subtitles.english: It's not an illusion.

subtitles.original: 私が私でいる理由を
subtitles.english: The reason why I am who I am...

subtitles.original: 君の笑顔に貰っていた
subtitles.english: ...I received from your smile.

subtitles.original: そうさ 画面の中
subtitles.english: Yes, inside the screen,

subtitles.original: 隠せない 消えない 見えない
subtitles.english: unable to hide, unable to vanish, unable to see.

subtitles.original: それでも それでも
subtitles.english: Even so, even so,

subtitles.original: 私は
subtitles.english: I will...

subtitles.original: 君の光を追って
subtitles.english: ...chase after your light.

subtitles.original: 閉じこもる暗い 硝子の曇りを払って
subtitles.english: Wiping away the fog of the dark glass I was locked in,

subtitles.original: 今、明日を見つけたんだ
subtitles.english: I have now found tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 忘れたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to forget

subtitles.original: 君がくれたこの感情を
subtitles.english: this feeling that you gave me.

subtitles.original: 見つめる 姿鏡の奥の
subtitles.english: Staring into the depths of the full-length mirror,

subtitles.original: 涙の跡は見せられないけど
subtitles.english: though I can't show the traces of my tears...

subtitles.original: 磨かれたガラスの向こう
subtitles.english: On the other side of the polished glass,

subtitles.original: 笑って輝いていた
subtitles.english: I smiled and shone,

subtitles.original: いたいだけで
subtitles.english: just wanting to be...

subtitles.original: 誰のためだっけ？
subtitles.english: Whose sake was it for again?

subtitles.original: 声が 姿が 誰でもない気がした
subtitles.english: My voice, my form, I felt like they belonged to no one.

subtitles.original: 「孤独だ」ってまた迷い出す
subtitles.english: Crying "I'm so lonely," I start to wander again.

subtitles.original: 画面の奥の歪みを
subtitles.english: The distortion deep inside the screen,

subtitles.original: いつでも いつでも 君は
subtitles.english: you always, always...

subtitles.original: 映す光の中に
subtitles.english: ...within the reflecting light...

subtitles.original: 名もない私の声を見つけてくれてた
subtitles.english: ...found my nameless voice.

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Always.

subtitles.original: この声も、姿も、紛れもない私だ
subtitles.english: This voice, this appearance, is unmistakably me.
